title: Curiso — See Knowledge Come Alive
aha_moment: AI can transform any topic into beautiful, animated visual explanations instantly

scenes.narration: Bold text 'Learn anything.' fades in centered, holds, then 'See everything.' appears below. Both fade out. The word 'Calculus' appears in yellow, then dissolves and transforms into a live derivative graph being drawn — a smooth curve with its tangent line sliding along it.
scenes.animation_description: Set self.camera.background_color = '#000000'. Create text_learn = Text('Learn anything.', font='Avenir', font_size=44, color='#FFFFFF').move_to(UP * 0.5). Play FadeIn(text_learn, shift=UP * 0.3, run_time=1.2). self.wait(2). Create text_see = Text('See everything.', font='Avenir', font_size=44, color='#FFFFFF').next_to(text_learn, DOWN, buff=0.7). Play FadeIn(text_see, shift=UP * 0.3, run_time=1.0). self.wait(1.5). Play FadeOut(text_learn, run_time=0.6), FadeOut(text_see, run_time=0.6) simultaneously. self.wait(0.5). Create topic_word = Text('Calculus', font='Avenir', font_size=48, color='#FFFF00').move_to(ORIGIN). Play FadeIn(topic_word, scale=1.3, run_time=0.8). self.wait(1.0). Create axes = Axes(x_range=[-3, 3, 1], y_range=[-1, 5, 1], x_length=8, y_length=4.5, axis_config={'color': '#888888', 'stroke_width': 2}).move_to(ORIGIN). Create curve = axes.plot(lambda x: x**2, x_range=[-2.2, 2.2], color='#83C167', stroke_width=3). Play ReplacementTransform(topic_word, axes, run_time=1.2). Play Create(curve, run_time=1.5). self.wait(0.5). Create dot = Dot(axes.c2p(1, 1), color='#FFFF00', radius=0.08). Create tangent = axes.plot(lambda x: 2 * (x - 1) + 1, x_range=[-0.5, 2.5], color='#FC6255', stroke_width=2). Play FadeIn(dot, scale=0.5, run_time=0.4). Play Create(tangent, run_time=1.0). self.wait(1.5). Play FadeOut(axes, curve, dot, tangent, run_time=0.8). self.wait(0.5). Total waits: 2 + 1.5 + 0.5 + 1.0 + 0.5 + 1.5 + 0.5 = 7.5s, plus animation run_times ~7.2s = ~15s total scene length.

scenes.narration: Rapid-fire montage of four stunning Manim animations: Euler's identity being handwritten, a sine wave plotted on coordinate axes, a binary tree data structure with flowing highlights, and electromagnetic wave vectors oscillating. Each appears, holds briefly, then fades to make way for the next.
scenes.animation_description: Set self.camera.background_color = '#000000'. SEGMENT 1 — Euler's Identity (~5s): Create euler = MathTex(r'e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0', font_size=56, color='#FFFFFF').move_to(ORIGIN). Play Write(euler, run_time=2.0). self.wait(2.0). Play FadeOut(euler, run_time=0.6). self.wait(0.4). SEGMENT 2 — Sine Wave (~5s): Create axes2 = Axes(x_range=[0, 2 * PI, PI / 2], y_range=[-1.5, 1.5, 0.5], x_length=10, y_length=4, axis_config={'color': '#888888', 'stroke_width': 2, 'include_tip': False}).move_to(ORIGIN). Create sine = axes2.plot(lambda x: np.sin(x), x_range=[0, 2 * PI], color='#58C4DD', stroke_width=3). Create sine_label = MathTex(r'\sin(x)', font_size=28, color='#58C4DD').next_to(axes2, UR, buff=0.3). Play Create(axes2, run_time=0.8). Play Create(sine, run_time=1.5). Play FadeIn(sine_label, run_time=0.5). self.wait(1.5). Play FadeOut(axes2, sine, sine_label, run_time=0.6). self.wait(0.4). SEGMENT 3 — Binary Tree (~5s): Create nodes as a list of 7 circles — root at UP * 1.5, two children at UP * 1.5 + LEFT * 2.5 and UP * 1.5 + RIGHT * 2.5 shifted down by 1.5, four leaves similarly. Each node = Circle(radius=0.3, color='#58C4DD', stroke_width=2).move_to(position). Create lines connecting parent to children using Line(parent.get_bottom(), child.get_top(), color='#888888', stroke_width=2). Root position = UP * 1.5. Level 1: LEFT * 2 + ORIGIN, RIGHT * 2 + ORIGIN. Level 2: LEFT * 3.2 + DOWN * 1.5, LEFT * 0.8 + DOWN * 1.5, RIGHT * 0.8 + DOWN * 1.5, RIGHT * 3.2 + DOWN * 1.5. Group all lines into tree_lines = VGroup(*lines). Group all nodes into tree_nodes = VGroup(*nodes). Play Create(tree_lines, run_time=0.8). Play FadeIn(tree_nodes, run_time=0.6). self.wait(0.5). Highlight traversal: for each of the 7 nodes in BFS order, play node.animate.set_fill('#FFFF00', opacity=0.4).set_stroke_color('#FFFF00'), run_time=0.25. self.wait(1.0). Play FadeOut(tree_lines, tree_nodes, run_time=0.6). self.wait(0.4). SEGMENT 4 — Wave Vectors (~5s): Create axes3 = Axes(x_range=[0, 6, 1], y_range=[-2, 2, 1], x_length=10, y_length=4, axis_config={'color': '#888888', 'stroke_width': 2, 'include_tip': False}).move_to(ORIGIN). Create 12 vectors along the x-axis at x = 0.5, 1.0, ..., 6.0. Each vector = Arrow(start=axes3.c2p(x_val, 0), end=axes3.c2p(x_val, 1.2 * np.sin(x_val)), color='#FC6255', stroke_width=2.5, buff=0, max_tip_length_to_length_ratio=0.2). Group as vectors = VGroup(*all_arrows). Play Create(axes3, run_time=0.6). Play LaggedStart(*[GrowArrow(v) for v in vectors], lag_ratio=0.08, run_time=1.5). self.wait(1.5). Play FadeOut(axes3, vectors, run_time=0.6). self.wait(0.4). Total waits: 2.0 + 0.4 + 1.5 + 0.4 + 0.5 + 1.0 + 0.4 + 1.5 + 0.4 = 8.1s, plus animation run_times ~12.5s = ~20.5s total scene length.

scenes.narration: Screen goes black. The Curiso logo text fades in large and centered. A tagline appears below it. A yellow call-to-action invites viewers to try it. The final frame holds for dramatic effect.
scenes.animation_description: Set self.camera.background_color = '#000000'. Start with a completely empty scene. self.wait(1.0). Create logo = Text('Curiso', font='Avenir', font_size=56, color='#FFFFFF', weight=BOLD).move_to(UP * 0.5). Play FadeIn(logo, scale=1.2, run_time=1.2). self.wait(2.0). Create tagline = Text('AI-powered educational videos.', font='Avenir', font_size=28, color='#888888').next_to(logo, DOWN, buff=0.7). Play FadeIn(tagline, shift=UP * 0.2, run_time=0.8). self.wait(1.0). Create cta = Text('Try it now.', font='Avenir', font_size=26, color='#FFFF00').next_to(tagline, DOWN, buff=0.7). Play FadeIn(cta, shift=UP * 0.2, run_time=0.8). self.wait(1.0). self.wait(3.0). Total waits: 1.0 + 2.0 + 1.0 + 1.0 + 3.0 = 8.0s, plus animation run_times ~2.8s = ~10.8s total scene length.
